aiApprovalDialog.title: Approval Required
aiApprovalDialog.pendingApproverDescription: This action needs approval in the Approvals area or the Breeze mobile app.
aiApprovalDialog.urgentWarning: Less than 30 seconds remaining. This request will be auto-rejected.
aiApprovalDialog.noApproverDevice: Approving your own request requires Touch ID / Windows Hello.

aiChatInput.thinking: AI is thinking... click stop to cancel

aiChatMessages.title: Breeze AI Assistant
aiChatMessages.description: Ask about your devices, alerts, metrics, or troubleshoot issues.

serverHealth.label: Check server health
serverHealth.prompt: Check the health status of all Windows servers — show CPU, RAM, disk usage and any alerts

criticalAlerts.label: Show critical alerts
criticalAlerts.prompt: List all critical and high severity alerts from the last 24 hours with device details

offlineDevices.label: Find offline devices
offlineDevices.prompt: Show me all devices that are currently offline and when they were last seen

securityOverview.label: Security overview
securityOverview.prompt: Give me a security overview — any active threats, recent scans, and devices needing attention

diskSpace.label: Disk space report
diskSpace.prompt: Which devices are running low on disk space? Show devices with over 80% disk usage

recentActivity.label: Recent activity
recentActivity.prompt: Show me the most recent audit log entries — what actions were taken in the last few hours?

aiForOfficePage.title: AI for Office
aiForOfficePage.description: Governed AI assistant in your clients' Excel — provisioning, policy, audit, usage and templates

errors.copyConsent: Could not copy — select the URL manually
errors.enableAi: Failed to enable AI for Office
errors.loadConsent: Failed to load the consent URL. Close and retry.

notEnabled.title: Breeze AI for Office is not enabled on this instance.
notEnabled.description: Set CLIENT_AI_ENTRA_CLIENT_ID (the Entra add-in app registration) on the API and reload.

orgsTab.title: Client organizations
orgsTab.description: Provision the Excel AI assistant per client org: map the Entra tenant, grant admin consent, enable the policy, deploy the add-in.

removeMapping.title: Remove tenant mapping
removeMapping.message: Users in {{orgName}}'s Entra tenant will no longer be able to sign in to the Excel assistant. The org policy and usage history are kept.

wizard.title: Set up AI for Office — {{orgName}}
wizard.mapDescription: Map this org to its Microsoft Entra tenant (Directory ID). The mapping is the tenant-isolation linchpin — every Excel sign-in from this tenant lands in this org.
wizard.prefilled: Pre-filled from the org’s existing Microsoft 365 connection.
wizard.guidError: Must be a GUID (Entra admin center → Overview → Tenant ID).
wizard.consentDescription: A Microsoft 365 admin of the client tenant must grant admin consent to the Breeze AI for Office app. Send them this link (or open it yourself if you hold Global Admin in the client tenant):
wizard.afterConsent: After granting, Microsoft redirects to a Breeze confirmation page. Consent shows as granted here once the first user signs in from Excel — there is no live poll against Microsoft (Plan-4 decision 1).
wizard.enableDescription: Enable the assistant for this org. This writes enabled: true to the org policy with safe defaults (all users, read/write with end-user approval, DLP redaction for financial/credential types). Tune everything in the policy editor afterwards.
wizard.deployTitle: Deploy the Excel add-in via Microsoft 365 centralized deployment

deploySteps.signIn: Sign in to the client tenant's Microsoft 365 admin center → Settings → Integrated apps.
deploySteps.upload: Choose Upload custom apps → Office add-in → provide the Breeze AI for Office manifest URL from your Breeze instance.
deploySteps.assign: Assign the add-in to everyone or to the user groups covered by this org's access policy.
deploySteps.wait: Deployment can take up to 24h to appear in users' Excel ribbon (Home → Add-ins).
deploySteps.signInAutomatically: Users sign in automatically with their Microsoft work account — no extra credentials.

errors.ruleNameRequired: Every custom DLP rule needs a name
errors.invalidPattern: DLP rule "{{ruleName}}" has an invalid pattern — fix it before saving
errors.load: Failed to load the org policy.

policyEditor.title: Org policy
policyEditor.description: Everything this client org's Excel assistant is allowed to do.

workbookAccessOptions.readWrite: Read & write (writes approval-gated by the end user)
workbookAccessOptions.readOnly: Read only (write tools removed from the model)

writeOptions.ask: Ask every time (end user approves each write)
writeOptions.allowAuto: Allow auto-apply (end user may opt into auto)

policyEditor.autoApplyHint: Auto-apply is off by default and only possible when allowed here.

userAccessOptions.all: All users in the mapped tenant

policyEditor.noUsersHint: No users have signed in from Excel yet — users appear here after their first sign-in. Until then, leave access on "All users".
policyEditor.brandingDescription: Shown in the add-in footer: "Governed by your IT provider" — the white-label hook (spec §11).
policyEditor.dlpDescription: Every payload leaving Breeze for the model is scanned (spec §6). Redacted values are stored redacted — the audit trail never keeps the sensitive form.
policyEditor.testSample: Test sample (paste representative cell data — evaluated locally, never sent anywhere)
policyEditor.patternCompiles: Pattern compiles — add a test sample above to see matches

errors.loadTranscript: Failed to load the session transcript.

sessionsTab.empty: No client AI sessions match the filters
sessionsTab.noMessages: No messages stored for this session.

flagDialog.title: Flag session
flagDialog.description: Flagging marks the session for follow-up and is recorded in the audit log.

unflagDialog.title: Unflag session
unflagDialog.message: Remove the flag from this session? The flag/unflag history stays in the audit log.

templatesTab.title: Prompt templates
templatesTab.description: Shown in the add-in's empty-chat picker. "All orgs" templates reach every client org; org templates only theirs.
templatesTab.empty: No templates yet — create the first one

deleteDialog.title: Delete template
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}"? It disappears from the add-in's template picker immediately.

templatesTab.scopeImmutable: Scope can't change after creation — delete and recreate to move it.
templatesTab.appsHint: Leave all unchecked to show this template in every app.

errors.load: Failed to load the usage report.

usageTab.rangeError: From month must be ≤ to month
usageTab.empty: No usage recorded in this range

errors.autoDraft: Couldn't auto-draft from this conversation — you can fill in the ticket manually.

workspaceEmptyState.title: AI Workspace
workspaceEmptyState.description: Run multiple AI conversations simultaneously. Investigate a device issue in one tab while configuring a policy in another.

createTicketFromChatModal.title: Create ticket from conversation
createTicketFromChatModal.subject: Subject
createTicketFromChatModal.resolutionRequired: A resolution note is required to resolve.
